## Checklist

- [ ] Code runs end-to-end (I tested it with a real Commune API key)
- [ ] `.env.example` included with all required variables listed
- [ ] `requirements.txt` or `package.json` is up to date
- [ ] README in the example folder explains what it does and how to run it
- [ ] No real API keys, emails, or phone numbers in the diff
